race.comment: RED EYE SAMURAI (2) comes here off a placing in sharp time (23.31) over 410m at Horsham. Should be in this for a long way. WHIPSTICK BOBBI (1) boxed on well to finish second last time, beaten 1.3 lengths (22.36) behind I'm To Blame at Warrnambool. Well-placed to take this out. KIWI FRED (7) was a respectable 23.01 winner of a Grade 5 at Wagga last start. Has the ability and looks a key chance. KRAKEN REG (8) should be thereabouts despite an unplaced run here most recently.
